main_subtitle: In keeping with the spirit of digital sobriety and transparency of this project, this site is designed to respect your privacy. No personal data is collected, resold or used for advertising purposes. We do not use any tracking cookies
section_stats_title: Statistics (GoatCounter)
section_stats_text: To understand audience and improve content, this site uses GoatCounter, a third-party audience analytics service without cookies and respectful of privacy.
stats_li1: Total anonymity: No data that allows identifying visitors (such as full IP address) is retained
stats_li2: No tracking: Navigation is never followed outside this site
stats_li3: Compliance: This tool is compliant by default with GDPR and therefore requires no intrusive consent banner
section_contact_title: Contact form
contact_privacy_li2: The information entered in the form is used solely for sending the email. No personal data is stored in a database. This form is a direct bridge, not a data collector
section_darkmode_title: Display preferences (Light/Dark mode) - Coming soon
darkmode_text: To remember your theme choice (light or dark), your browser's local storage (localStorage) is used.
darkmode_li1: This information remains exclusively on your device
darkmode_li2: It is never transmitted to the site's servers
darkmode_li3: It is used solely to provide consistent reading comfort during subsequent visits
section_hosting_title: Hosting
hosting_text1: This site is hosted by OVHcloud. Like any host, OVHcloud may retain standard technical logs (IP address, etc.) as part of its normal operation and infrastructure security. This data is not exploited by TCP/UP for analytics or marketing purposes.
hosting_text2: To optimize performance, multimedia resources (images, documents) are stored externally on a GitHub repository and distributed via the jsDelivr content delivery network (CDN). When displaying these elements, these third-party services may also process technical connection data in accordance with their respective privacy policies.
